{
  "contents": "import { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { Button, DatePicker, Select, message } from \"antd\";\nimport { useNavigate } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport dayjs from \"dayjs\";\nimport { SearchOutlined } from \"@ant-design/icons\";\nimport { ROOMS_PREVIEW } from \"./homeContent\";\nimport { useLandingSession } from \"./useLandingSession\";\nimport LandingCta from \"./LandingCta\";\n\nexport default function LandingBooking() {\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const { user, guest } = useLandingSession();\n  const [checkin, setCheckin] = useState(null);\n  const [checkout, setCheckout] = useState(null);\n  const [roomType, setRoomType] = useState(null);\n\n  /** `typeOverride`: when clicking a product card — filter by Standard/Deluxe/Suite/VIP */\n  const buildRoomsSearch = (typeOverride) => {\n    const params = new URLSearchParams();\n    if (checkin && checkout) {\n      params.set(\"checkin\", checkin.format(\"YYYY-MM-DD\"));\n      params.set(\"checkout\", checkout.format(\"YYYY-MM-DD\"));\n    }\n    const t = typeOverride !== undefined && typeOverride !== null ? typeOverride : roomType;\n    if (t) params.set(\"type\", t);\n    const q = params.toString();\n    return q ? `?${q}` : \"\";\n  };\n\n  const goToRooms = (typeOverride) => {\n    if (user) {\n      navigate(\"/bookings\");\n      return;\n    }\n    if (guest) {\n      navigate(`/guest/rooms${buildRoomsSearch(typeOverride)}`);\n      return;\n    }\n    if ((checkin && !checkout) || (!checkin && checkout)) {\n      message.warning(\"Please select both check-in and check-out, or leave both empty to see all rooms.\");\n      return;\n    }\n    if (checkin && checkout && !checkout.isAfter(checkin, \"day\")) {\n      message.warning(\"Check-out must be after check-in.\");\n      return;\n    }\n    navigate(`/guest/rooms${buildRoomsSearch(typeOverride)}`);\n  };\n\n  const handleBooking = () => goToRooms(undefined);\n\n  const handleProductClick = (productType) => {\n    setRoomType(productType);\n    goToRooms(productType);\n  };",
  "totalLinesInFile": 164
}

{ ...item, children: item.children.filter((c) => hasPermission(user, c.permission)) }\n        : item\n    );\n}\n\nconst userMenu = [\n  { key: \"profile\", icon: <UserOutlined />, label: \"My Profile\" },\n  { key: \"settings\", icon: <SettingOutlined />, label: \"Settings\" },\n  { type: \"divider\" },\n  { key: \"logout\", icon: <LogoutOutlined />, label: \"Sign Out\", danger: true },\n];\n\nexport default function MainLayout() {\n  const [collapsed, setCollapsed] = useState(false);\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const location = useLocation();\n  const rawUser = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(\"user\") || \"{}\");\n  const user = rawUser.role ? roomTypes.map((r) => (\n                  <div key={r.type}>\n                    <div style={{ display: \"flex\", justifyContent: \"space-between\", alignItems: \"center\", marginBottom: 6 }}>\n                      <div style={{ display: \"flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: 6 }}>\n                        <span style={{ fontSize: 14 }}>{roomTypeIcons[r.type] || \"🛏️\"}</span>\n                        <span style={{ fontWeight: 600, fontSize: 13, color: \"#1e293b\" }}>{r.type}</span>\n                      </div>\n                      <span style={{ fontSize: 12, color: \"#94a3b8\", fontWeight: 500 }}>\n                        {r.occupied}/{r.total}\n                        <span style={{ color: roomTypeColors[r.type] || \"#6366f1\", fontWeight: 700, marginLeft: 4 }}>({r.total > 0 ? Math.round((r.occupied / r.total) * 100) : 0}%)</span>\n                      </span>\n                    </div>\n                    <Progress percent={r.total > 0 ? Math.round((r.occupied / r.total) * 100) : 0} strokeColor={roomTypeColors[r.type] || \"#6366f1\"} trailColor=\"#f1f5f9\" size=\"small\" showInfo={false} strokeLinecap=\"round\" />\n                  </div>\n                )) : (\n                <div style={{ textAlign: 'center', padding: 20 }}>\n                  <span style={{ color: '#94a3b8', fontSize: 13 }}>No room data available</span>\n                </div>\n              )}\n              </div>\n            </Card>\n          </Col>\n        </Row>\n\n        {/* Recent Bookings */}\n        <Card variant=\"borderless\" style={cardStyle}\n          title={\n            <div style={{ display: \"flex\", justifyContent: \"space-between\", alignItems: \"center\" }}>\n              <div style={{ fontWeight: 700, fontSize: 15, color: \"#1e293b\" }}>Recent Bookings</div>\n              <Button type=\"text\" size=\"small\" style={{ color: \"#6366f1\", fontWeight: 600, fontSize: 12 }}>View all <RightOutlined /></Button>\n            </div>\n          }\n          styles={{ header: cardHeadStyle }}\n        >\n          <Table\n            dataSource={recentBookings}\n            columns={columns}\n            rowKey=\"id\"\n            pagination={false}\n            size=\"middle\"\n            onRow={() => ({\n              onMouseEnter: (e) => e.currentTarget.style.background = \"#f8fafc\",\n              onMouseLeave: (e) => e.currentTarget.style.background = \"transparent\",\n            })}\n          />\n        </Card>\n    </div>",

### Dashboard
- **View details** → chuyển tới `/invoices` (doanh thu / hóa đơn).
- **View all** → chuyển tới `/bookings`.

### Sơ đồ tầng (Floor map)
- **Book This Room** → đóng modal, chuyển tới `/bookings?room=<id phòng>`. Trang Bookings đọc query, tìm phòng theo `id` hoặc `number`, mở form **New Booking** và gán sẵn phòng (có thông báo).

### Profile → Security
- **Enable Now** (2FA) → modal hướng dẫn; bấm **I have the app ready** → đóng modal + `message.success`.
- **View Details** (phiên đăng nhập) → modal danh sách thiết bị (mẫu).
- **Sign out all devices** → `Popconfirm` rồi `message.success` khi xác nhận.

### MainLayout (header)
- **Chuông** → mở **Drawer** bên phải với danh sách thông báo mẫu.
- **Settings** (icon bánh răng) → `/profile`.
- Menu user **Settings** → cũng tới `/profile` (cùng `handleUserMenu`).

Build `npm run build` đã chạy thành công.

---
